summary: Frontend testing completed for formatting fixes on Landing Page and Appeal Statistics Page. All requested formatting changes verified as implemented correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Formatting fixes verified: 1) Landing page 'Simple, Affordable Access' heading uses text-3xl md:text-4xl, 2) Appeal Statistics page state tabs have different colours (NSW=blue, VIC=purple, QLD=red, SA=blue, WA=emerald, TAS=teal, NT=orange, ACT=indigo), 3) Data Sources section has compact horizontal layout with flex-wrap and bullet dots, 4) Section headings use text-2xl/text-3xl, 5) Numbered headings (1-5) use text-xl with red color and bold font, 6) Body text under numbered headings is text-sm, 7) 'This Tool's Purpose' heading uses text-2xl

landing_page_simple_affordable_access_he.details: Heading found with classes: text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold text-slate-900 mb-3

state_tabs_different_colours.details: NSW=blue-600, VIC=purple-600, QLD=red-600, SA=blue-600, WA=emerald-600, TAS=teal-600, NT=orange-600, ACT=indigo-600

state_tabs_clickable.details: All state tabs (NSW, VIC, QLD, SA, WA, TAS, NT, ACT) are clickable and show respective statistics

data_sources_compact_horizontal_layout.details: Data Sources section uses flex-wrap layout with bullet dots (rounded-full)

section_headings_large.details: 'The Appeal Access Crisis' uses text-2xl md:text-3xl, 'Data Limitations' uses text-2xl, 'Why Are Appeal Rates So Low?' uses text-2xl

numbered_headings_bigger_red_bold.details: All 5 numbered headings (1-5) use font-bold text-xl with red color rgb(252, 165, 165)

body_text_smaller.details: Body text under numbered headings uses text-sm (verified in code)

this_tools_purpose_heading_large.details: 'This Tool's Purpose' heading uses font-bold text-2xl mb-2 text-white
